title: PR-context inline comments list
description: YAML list embedded inside the ` ```yaml ... ``` ` fence under the `# Comments` section of a `.vinta-ai-workflows/prs-context/{feature-kebab}/phase-{phase.id}.md` file. Authored by `implement-plan` (or `amend-plan`); read by `open-pr.sh` to post each entry as an inline review comment via `gh` / `glab`. Empty list is valid (clean phase, nothing non-obvious).

file.description: Path relative to the repo root.

start_line.description: First line of the commented region on the new side of the diff (1-based).

end_line.description: Optional last line of a multi-line comment (1-based, inclusive). Omit for single-line comments.

side.description: Which side of the diff the comment attaches to. `RIGHT` = post-change (default). `LEFT` = pre-change (rare; for comments on removed code).

body.description: Markdown comment body. 1–3 lines explaining non-obvious context. Reference plan §1 / §2 entries when the decision lives there. Don't restate code.

allOf.description: If end_line is provided, it must be >= start_line.
